title: Amazon EC2 high memory U7i Instances for large in-memory databases
description: Unleash unparalleled power with U7i instances: up to 32 TiB DDR5 memory, 896 vCPUs, and unmatched performance for in-memory databases like SAP HANA, Oracle, and SQL Server.
creator: Jeff Barr
